# Alice 3 Project

A fun, interactive game that tests your math skills to escape the maze and win the game!

[![Download Alice 3]
(data:image/jpeg;base64,)
(https://www.alice.org/get-alice/alice-3/)]

## Requirements
- Alice 3 application
- Knowledge of PEMDAS, percentages, rounding, measurements, and inequalities

## Overview
After opening the game, users can begin playing immediately.

## Instructions
